name: RACE — Resume-as-Code Engine
description: Resume tailoring tool using Claude to curate bullets and skills from a personal bank for specific job descriptions; features inline editing, per-bullet rewrite, section reordering, and Puppeteer-based PDF export.

name: Social Scheduler
description: Five specialized LangGraph agents coordinate group social plans through 1:1 iMessage conversations without a group chat. Agents handle message parsing, venue search via live APIs, preference learning, and orchestration with persistent state across sessions.

name: Personal Assistant
description: AI-powered personal chief of staff managing job search, calendar, email, and daily planning through MCP integrations (Gmail, Google Calendar, browser automation, iMessage). 15+ custom slash commands, persistent memory across conversations, and automated multi-step workflows.

name: Job Application Agents
description: Suite of collaborative AI agents for job searching at scale: automated resume tailoring, cover letter generation, job-description matching, and application tracking. Human-in-the-loop architecture where AI handles research and drafting while the user makes final decisions.

name: Blackjack
description: Online blackjack for playing with friends across the globe in real-time. WebSocket-based game state synchronization across clients, multiplayer lobby system, and conflict resolution for concurrent actions.

name: Decipher
description: Speedcubing timer with solve tracking, session statistics, and historical performance analytics. Full-stack React app with real-time state management and persistent data storage.
